fields.name: Family No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the product family for which the family line is created.
The program copies the family number automatically from the No. field or the Family table.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the product family line.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies which items belong to a family.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the product family line.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an extended description if there is not enough space in the Description field.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity for the item in this family line.

fields.name: Low-Level Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the low-level code of the item in the item family.
